prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 17071→17152→16702→14526→15555，整体呈波动走势；2024 年大幅前移至 14526 名（近年最佳），2025 年回落至 15555 名，近 2 年波动约 1029 名，2025 年基准约 15555 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年依次为 44→48→50→56→60 人，持续小幅扩招；2026 年计划大幅增至 79 人，较 2025 年扩招约 31.7%，显著增加录取名额，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名稳定在 54–61 区间，属于中上游 211 水平；声誉文件中未见该校明显负面舆情记录；抖音热度总排名未进入前 106 名，关注度一般；未见投档断档异常记录，整体声誉平稳；该校传统优势在地质学、地质资源与地质工程等领域，与招生专业中的地质学类、地质类等对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业（计算机类、电子信息类等）报考吸引力较强；本省物理类考生 2026 年约 206500 人，较 2025 年 172468 人增加约 19.7%，竞争明显加剧；该校位于湖北武汉，在陕西招生占比约 1.4%–1.8%，属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 15555 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 31.7%（缓解竞争）与物理类考生增加约 19.7%（加剧竞争）的双向作用，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，整体竞争略有缓解；结合专业热度偏高、声誉平稳等因素，预测 2026 年最低位次约 18480 名，区间 17980–18980 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 17071→17152→16702→14526→15555, showing a fluctuating trend; in 2024, it significantly advanced to 14526 (best in recent years), and in 2025 it fell back to 15555, with a fluctuation of about 1029 places in the last 2 years, and the 2025 baseline is about 15555; the provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 44→48→50→56→60 students, with continuous small expansion; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 79 students, an expansion of about 31.7% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots, which alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 54–61 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; no significant negative public opinion records for this university were found in reputation documents; Douyin popularity total ranking did not enter the top 106, with average attention; no abnormal file-breaking records were observed, overall reputation is stable; the university's traditional strengths lie in geology, geological resources and geological engineering, corresponding to majors such as Geology and Geological Sciences in the enrollment list.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, and the university's related majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.) have strong appeal for applicants; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with a enrollment share of about 1.4%–1.8% in Shaanxi, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 15555, the significant enrollment expansion of about 31.7% in 2026 (alleviating competition) and the increase in Physics Category candidates by about 19.7% (intensifying competition), the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, resulting in a slight overall easing of competition; combined with factors such as high major popularity and stable reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 18480, with a range of 17980–18980.

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Future Technology College) (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, etc.)
- Geology (National Top Talent Program, National Science Base Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation)
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying and Information)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Earth Science)
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Public Administration (Land Management and Safety Emergency).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17980–18980, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<17980), you can focus on reaching for popular majors in Tier 1 such as Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>18980), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
